case_title: SMORTCHEVSKY, JOHN J. VS STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMORTCHEVSKY, JOHN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. $663.39 PRINCIPAL, $69.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $733.31 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
